message.create_pocket_factory.entrance_b: The Pocket Factory Entrance cannot be used inside the factory.
message.create_pocket_factory.factory_mi: Pocket Factory dimension is not available.
message.create_pocket_factory.expand.out: This direction has already reached the maximum 30-chunk radius.
message.create_pocket_factory.expand.hei: This direction is too close to the world height limit to expand further.
message.create_pocket_factory.expand.hor: Expanded by 1 chunk in that direction and consumed 1 Pocket Factory Core.
message.create_pocket_factory.expand.ver: Applied a vertical expansion of %s blocks.
message.create_pocket_factory.return_fal: Return point unavailable, sent to the Overworld spawn.
tooltip.create_pocket_factory.pocket_fac: Unbound factory: one will be assigned after placement.
Unbound factory: select it with the core, then click an entrance to finish linking.
tooltip.create_pocket_factory.linked_chu: Unbound factory: this will become a linked chute endpoint in phase 6.
tooltip.create_pocket_factory.pocket_fac: Debug item: right-click to open the Pocket Factory debug panel.
Use the debug panel to inspect factories and click teleport or return actions.
Debug only: use the Pocket Factory Entrance block for survival access.
Hold and right-click Pocket Factory Block A to trigger factory expansion.
Horizontal expansion consumes 1 core; vertical expansion is fixed at 1 block per use.
Hold and right-click a normal Item Vault to convert the whole multiblock into a Linked Item Vault.
Hold and right-click a normal Fluid Tank to convert the whole multiblock into a Linked Fluid Tank.
Hold and right-click two normal vertical chutes to create a new linked chute binding.
Hold and right-click two normal mechanical pumps to create a new linked pump binding.
debug.create_pocket_factory.menu.title: Creative Pocket Factory Debug Eye
debug.create_pocket_factory.menu.empty: There are no registered factories yet.
debug.create_pocket_factory.menu.require: You must hold the Creative Pocket Factory Debug Eye to use debug commands.
debug.create_pocket_factory.menu.factory: Factory ID %s still has a valid entrance and does not need recovery.
debug.create_pocket_factory.menu.recover: Granted a recovery entrance item for Factory ID %s.
